name: Unity Game Exporter (WASM)
description: Export characters, items, and locations as Unity-ready ScriptableObjects with metadata, portraits, and prefab stubs. Generate C# data classes, batch export for game data pipelines, and integrate directly with Unity projects.
author: BiloxiStudios

unity_project_path.label: Unity Project Path
unity_project_path.description: Path to the Unity project root (contains Assets folder)

output_subdir.label: Output Subdirectory
output_subdir.description: Subdirectory under Assets/ for exported data (e.g., Data/CityOfBrains)

generate_enums.label: Generate Enums
generate_enums.description: Generate C# enum types from entity field options (e.g., Gender, Faction)

export_portraits.label: Export Portraits
export_portraits.description: Include entity portrait images in export

generate_prefab_stubs.label: Generate Prefab Stubs
generate_prefab_stubs.description: Create empty prefab stub references for exported entities

auto_generate_meta.label: Generate .meta Files
auto_generate_meta.description: Create Unity .meta files alongside exported assets for stable GUIDs
